zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta於1192年出生在英國達勒姆拉比時，他的父親Robert FitzRoger25歲，母親Margaret de Chesney33歲。他於1215年與Ada de Balliol在英國英格蘭達勒姆巴納德 卡素結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1224年被列為sheriff of northumberland。他去世於1240年2月20日在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta于1192年出生在英国達勒姆拉比时，他的父亲Robert FitzRoger25岁，母亲Margaret de Chesney33岁。他于1215年与Ada de Balliol在英国英格兰達勒姆巴納德 卡素结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1224年被列为sheriff of northumberland。他去世于1240年2月20日在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stokes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Warwickshire): variant of Stoke with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. This name has been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

variants.name: Stoke
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places in England named with Middle English stoke (Old English stoc). The exact sense of the word is not clear, but it seems to have originally meant ‘place’ and was chiefly used for settlements dependent on a nearby estate center. Compare Stoker .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta was born in 1192, in Raby, Durham, England, his father, Robert FitzRoger, was 25 and his mother, Margaret de Chesney, was 33. He married Ada de Balliol in 1215, in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. In 1224, his occupation is listed as sheriff of northumberland. He died on 20 February 1240, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta est né en 1192, à Raby, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Robert FitzRoger, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Chesney, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Ada de Balliol en 1215, à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. En 1224, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of northumberland. Il est décédé le 20 février 1240, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.Barnard Castle, County Durham, England: Barnard Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta 1192 in Raby, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert FitzRoger 25 und seine Mutter Margaret de Chesney 33. Er hat 1215 in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom Ada de Balliol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1224 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of northumberland aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. Februar 1240 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Alnwick, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta è nato il nel 1192 nel Raby, Durham, England, il suo padre, Robert FitzRoger, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Chesney, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Ada de Balliol nel 1215, nel Barnard Castle, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1224, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of northumberland. Morì il 20 febbraio 1240, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Cartaが1192年にイギリスダルハムラビーで生まれた時，父Robert FitzRogerは25歳，母Margaret de Chesneyは33歳であった。1215年にイギリスイギリスダルハムバーナルド カストルでAda de Balliolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1224年，職業はsheriff of northumberlandと記録されている。彼は1240年2月20日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta(이)가 1192년 영국 뒤람 라비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert FitzRoger(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Chesney(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에서 Ada de Balliol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1224년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of northumberland이었다. 그는 1240년 2월 20일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta nasceu em 1192, em Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert FitzRoger, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Chesney, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Ada de Balliol em 1215, em Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1224, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of northumberland. Ele faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1240, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta родился в 1192 г. в местности раби, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert FitzRoger было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Chesney, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada de Balliol в 1215 г. в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1224 году он работал по профессии sheriff of northumberland. Он умер 20 февраля 1240 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

Se casó con Ada de Balliol en 1215, en Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. En 1224, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of northumberland. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1240, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
